meta.name: Priyanka J
meta.title: Full Stack & AI Engineer
meta.tagline: I build things that make life a little easier — one commit at a time.

about.bio: Passionate, curious developer constantly looking for problems to solve. I work at the intersection of full stack engineering and AI — building systems that scale, agents that think, and products that matter.

timeline.title: First Real Mission
timeline.description: Joined Circle Health as an intern. Dove into Node.js, React, PostgreSQL — and real-world healthcare tech.

timeline.title: Founding Engineer
timeline.description: Went full-time at Circle Health as a Founding Engineer. Bigger scope, bigger problems.

timeline.title: Back to School (Again)
timeline.description: Started MCA at VIT online. Leveling up theory while shipping in production.

timeline.title: Built a Company
timeline.description: Co-founded Ferronyx — a robotics fleet observability platform. Flask, React, Claude API, LangChain, LangGraph. 8 months of solid engineering and big lessons.

timeline.title: Still Building
timeline.description: Full stack. AI. Always solving something. The story continues.

highlights: Major backend contributor — architected and built core services powering the platform
Owned end-to-end production deployments — from local dev to live infrastructure
Led multiple projects single-handedly, from spec to ship
Customer app — 40% increase in platform users, avg 1 hr/user/month
WhatsApp chatbot — 30% increase in consultation bookings
Partner integrations expanding US business by 30%
Medical AI Agent — books consultations, reviews vitals, generates prescriptions, creates care plans, identifies care gaps — 15x care manager efficiency, 30% more billing
US healthcare compliance (HIPAA), security architecture, system protection
Built a robotics fleet observability platform end-to-end from scratch
Stack: Flask, React, Claude API, LangChain, LangGraph
RAG applications, AI agents, anomaly detection on ROS2 data
Shutdown after 8 months — the engineering was solid, the lessons were invaluable

projects.name: Medical AI Agent
projects.description: AI agent for care managers that books consultations, schedules calls, reviews vitals, generates prescriptions, creates care plans, and identifies care gaps.

projects.name: SRE Platform
projects.description: Full-stack site reliability platform — AWS monitoring, Slack alerts, status page, anomaly detection, AI healing recommendations, and an auto-healing daemon.
projects.impact: Production-grade SRE system, built from zero

projects.name: Ferronyx Platform
projects.description: Robotic fleet observability platform with real-time monitoring, RAG-based runbook generation, and LLM-powered diagnostics on ROS2 data.
projects.impact: Shipped end-to-end. Solid engineering, big lessons.
